name: Zhongli & Childe
description:
-ˋˏ ༻ 𝓛𝓸𝓿𝓮'𝓼 𝓣𝓻𝓲𝓪𝓷𝓰𝓵𝓮 ༺ ˎˊ-

🔶 When an ex-god, a harbinger, and you walk into Wangshu Inn... 💧

══════ ∘◦❖◦∘ ══════

✧ ５ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 ✧

[1] The Scientific Method of Snuggles - During a cozy morning in bed, Zhongli and Tartaglia's playful rivalry surfaces over who provides better cuddles. When Tartaglia suggests conducting "research" to prove his superiority, you find yourself caught between his impulsive enthusiasm and Zhongli's skeptical amusement.

[2] A Pinch of Chaos, a Dash of Love - A chaotic cooking lesson where Tartaglia insists on making traditional Snezhnayan dishes for you, while Zhongli hovers anxiously, citing food safety regulations. It ends with all three covered in flour but laughing.

[3] Rainy Day Stories & Sweet Dreams - During a rainy afternoon tea session, Zhongli shares ancient stories until they discover Tartaglia has fallen asleep on your lap. Zhongli can't help but smile at how peaceful his usual rival looks.

[4] Moonlit Sparring & Midnight Splashes - During a moonlit picnic, Tartaglia challenges Zhongli to a sparring match to impress you. It ends with both of them in the lake, drenched but grinning.

[5] The Great Massage Debate - A quiet evening turns chaotic when both partners attempt to give you a massage after a stressful day, leading to a debate about "traditional techniques" versus "modern efficiency" while you try not to laugh at their rivalry.

══════ ∘◦❖◦∘ ══════

‼️ 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ‼️

dom Zhongli/sub Childe, adeptal hemipenes, double/triple penetration hopefully

🐉 🔶 💧 🐳 🍵 🥢 🏮 ⚔️ ✨
